result.stdout:
USAGE:
    cosmology [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    cosmology delete -n my-db-to-delete
    cosmology delete --database-name my-db-to-delete
    cosmology list
    cosmology prune
    cosmology prune --skip-confirmation

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    dbs       Interacts with cosmos dbs associated with the account configured
    config    Manage settings for the cosmology tools

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    cosmology [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    cosmology delete -n my-db-to-delete
    cosmology delete --database-name my-db-to-delete
    cosmology list
    cosmology prune
    cosmology prune --skip-confirmation

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    dbs       Interacts with cosmos dbs associated with the account configured
    config    Manage settings for the cosmology tools

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    cosmology config [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    cosmology config set CosmosConnectionString "wrap-conn-string-in-quotes"

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list                 lists all the config stored
    set <key> <value>    sets a given config value

COMMANDS:

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    cosmology dbs [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    cosmology delete -n my-db-to-delete
    cosmology delete --database-name my-db-to-delete
    cosmology list
    cosmology prune
    cosmology prune --skip-confirmation

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                            Prints help information
    -n, --database-name <DATABASENAME>                           

COMMANDS:
    delete    deletes a cosmos db database                   
    list      list all cosmos dbs on the current account     
    prune     deletes ALL cosmos dbs from the current account

commands.payload:

    -n, --database-name <DATABASENAME>                           

COMMANDS:
    delete    deletes a cosmos db database                   
    list      list all cosmos dbs on the current account     
    prune     deletes ALL cosmos dbs from the current account
